hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f && [ -n "$f" ] && pnpm exec prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

{ cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && files=$({ git diff --name-only HEAD -- 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null; } | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|mts|cts|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|css|scss|md|mdx|ya?ml|gql|graphql|html)$' | sort -u | head -50) && [ -n "$files" ] && printf '%s\n' "$files" | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 pnpm exec prettier --write --cache --ignore-unknown --log-level=error; } 2>/dev/null || true
